args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.CloseDate, oli.Product2Id
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON oli.OpportunityId = o.Id
WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND o.CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND o.CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01';

args.query:
SELECT q.Id AS QuoteId, q.CreatedDate, q.ContactId, q.AccountId, qli.Product2Id
FROM Quote q
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON qli.QuoteId = q.Id
WHERE REPLACE(q.ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND q.CreatedDate >= TIMESTAMP '2021-06-01' AND q.CreatedDate < TIMESTAMP '2021-07-01';

WHERE REPLACE(q.ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND q.CreatedDate >= TIMESTAMP '2021-06-01' AND q.CreatedDate < TIMESTAMP '2021-07-01';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.CloseDate, oli.Product2Id
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON oli.OpportunityId = o.Id
WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01'
  AND CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01';
